violations.text: The following were observed in poor repair: -wall juncture at stairwell -floor tiles in basement -grease receptacle on ventilation hood. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen or bar. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC obtained hand soap during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026
The hand-washing sink in the basement was non-functional at the time of this inspection. Per PIC, sink stopped functioning after recent deep freeze. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwashers was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Inspector observed sanitizer for basement dishwasher not connected. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2026

Staff were not knowledgeable on how to properly set-up 3-bay sink. Inspector and staff set-up 3-bay sink and tested sanitizer during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2026

Working containers of liquid ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2026

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings and nesting materials. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerator have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026
The following were observed in poor repair: -wall juncture at stairwell -floor times in basement -grease receptacle on ventilation hood. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

The following have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and other debris: -floors in kitchen under equipment -floors under basement storage -ventilation hoods. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2026
Faucet at 3 bay sink observed leaking. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2024

Cooked Stews and Onion Sauce were observed held at 44-45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All TCS/ PHF foods were voluntarily disposed of by the PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2023
Soda Syrups were observed stored on the floor in the basement. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2023
Walk-in Cooler was observed at an ambient temperature of 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2023
